response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content: 00:00 - 01:54 contains intro/countdown, 01:54 - 04:58 features a song performance.
2. Identified song title 'Hyper Jumpin'' and performer 'hololive 5th Generation' via on-screen text.
3. Search Query: '"Hyper Jumpin'" PandaBOY Japanese and English lyrics'. Found multiple sources for the song lyrics.
4. Extracted lyrics and mapped to scenes as per the JSON schema requirements.
response.global_summary: This video is a virtual concert featuring a countdown and introduction (00:00 - 01:54) followed by the live performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the Hololive 5th Generation group, also known as NePoLaBo (Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka).

scenes.description: Countdown and introductory speech by the Hololive 5th Generation characters.
The Hololive 5th Generation (NePoLaBo) performs their song 'Hyper Jumpin''.
